executionSummary: Proposal #009 submitted on-chain as proposalId 9 (tx 0x9fa0540e4d6bbd6daa2d04562b53726060f7e15b47bef50804af768e95702c24). conditions: All 9 milestones accepted as proposed across 3 phases. 5 follow-on recommendations generated for CEO tracking. Phase 1 (Critical): multisig, timelock, RBAC, ownership transfer. Phase 2 (High): evaluation enforcement, divergence enforcement, prompt integrity. Phase 3 (Medium): canonical JSON, corpus weight protection.
